what: Risk register for FSC-2417: 0 risk(s) identified — CRITICAL=1, HIGH=6, overall=CRITICAL
why: Risk Anticipation Agent synthesised findings from 8 upstream Refinement agents for a HIGH-FCA story. 11 recommended action(s) for the Product Owner.

data.risk_summary: FSC-2417 carries a CRITICAL regulatory risk: the COBS 9.2 acknowledgement bypass and error scenario is entirely unspecified, meaning a defect could allow a non-compliant advice recommendation to be recorded without audit evidence — a direct FCA compliance failure. Six HIGH risks compound this posture, spanning incomplete-dimension scoring (Consumer Understanding breach), stale-data alert gaps across all three dimensions, hardcoded algorithm weights without AC validation, missing FLS / permission model coverage, and undefined COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c schema. This story must not enter development until CO sign-off is obtained and the CRITICAL and HIGH risks are mitigated; the Compliance Officer should be notified immediately given the HIGH-FCA classification confirmed unanimously by the Agent 3 ensemble.
recommended_actions: [CRITICAL — PO + CO ACTION BEFORE SPRINT START] Add acceptance criteria explicitly covering the COBS 9.2 acknowledgement failure path: (a) what happens if the acknowledgement fails to persist on FinancialAccount, and (b) what happens if SuitabilityScoreUpdated__e fires but the LWC does not receive it (stale score display). CO sign-off required on both scenarios before development begins (mitigates R-001).

[HIGH — PO ACTION] Add an AC covering behaviour when one or more of the three suitability dimensions (risk profile, investment objectives, financial circumstances) is null or partially completed — the dashboard must not display a calculated score and must clearly indicate to the Wealth Adviser that the assessment is incomplete (mitigates R-002).

[HIGH — PO ACTION] Extend the stale-data alert AC (currently AC3, financial circumstances only) to cover stale risk profile and stale investment objectives. All three dimensions must independently trigger a 'Requires Review' flag to prevent partial compliance being mistaken for full compliance (mitigates R-003).

[HIGH — PO + QE Lead ACTION] Add an AC validating the scoring algorithm: confirm that weighted aggregation (risk 40%, objectives 35%, circumstances 25%) always produces a result within 0–100, handles null dimension inputs without silent failure, and that the formula is regression-tested against known inputs/outputs. QE Lead to add boundary value tests for 0.00, 50.00, and 100.00 (mitigates R-004).

[HIGH — PO ACTION] Raise a separate story or spike to define the COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c object schema, RecordType, and FCA-mandated retention policy, and confirm that the consolidated score and acknowledgement are included in the regulatory audit pack. Block FSC-2417 test data setup on completion of that spike (mitigates R-005 and R-012).

[HIGH — QE Lead ACTION] Define NFR acceptance criteria for SuitabilityScoreCalculator under bulk load: specify governor limit behaviour for 200+ simultaneous Suitability__c updates, confirm bulkification pattern (no per-record SOQL), and add a bulk Apex test using ≥200 records. Confirm Platform Event quota impact and add monitoring/alerting for the 250,000 events/24hr org limit (mitigates R-006 and R-007).

[HIGH — PO + Tech Lead ACTION] Add FLS acceptance criteria specifying which Permission Sets grant read/write access to FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c and COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c. Deploy Permission Set changes as part of this story's definition of done; QE Lead to include FLS regression tests (mitigates R-008).

[MEDIUM — QE Lead ACTION] Add test coverage for the VulnerableCustomerIndicator__c context: if the flag is active on the client record, the suitability-dashboard LWC must surface enhanced-care context. Include this as a Consumer Duty regression scenario in the test suite (mitigates R-009).

[MEDIUM — QE Lead ACTION] Add a race-condition test for rapid successive Suitability__c updates to the same client — verify that the LWC always renders the latest consolidated score and not an out-of-order intermediate value. Document retry/fallback behaviour if Platform Event delivery exceeds 5 seconds (mitigates R-010).

[MEDIUM — QE Lead ACTION] Ensure test data factory supports: (a) RiskProfile__c inserted before Suitability__c, (b) ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c initialised to 0 on FinancialAccount, (c) no Suitability__c updates in @TestSetup, (d) per-test setup/teardown for Platform Event tests, (e) controlled LastAssessedDate__c values for stale-data tests, and (f) bulk insert mode for 200+ record scenarios (mitigates R-011).
[LOW — PO ACTION] Review INVEST score concerns (77/100) — tighten any vague AC wording identified by Agent 2 to improve story precision before sprint planning.
